name: @insler/serde-integration
description: Private cross-package integration suite for the serde subsystem: exercises the published surface (the @insler/serde interface umbrella + the json/msgpack/cbor/avro adapter packages) exactly as an external consumer would, against built dist output. serde is in-process serialization, so the suite needs no real infrastructure. Run by the path-filtered Serde Integration workflow; never published to npm.
